EXTENSION.QUICKSL.MULTIPLAYER_CONFIRM.bo: The host wants to reload the current run save. Quick Save Load will run for everyone after all clients agree. Do you agree?
EXTENSION.QUICKSL.MULTIPLAYER_HOST_CONFI: Player {player} wants to reload the current run save. After the host agrees, other clients will be asked and Quick Save Load will run for everyone. Do you agree?
EXTENSION.QUICKSL.MULTIPLAYER_CONFIRM_FR: Player {player} wants to reload the current run save. Quick Save Load will run for everyone after all required players agree. Do you agree?
EXTENSION.QUICKSL.MULTIPLAYER_WAITING.bo: Waiting for other players to confirm Quick Save Load.
EXTENSION.QUICKSL.MULTIPLAYER_WAITING_HO: Waiting for the host to confirm Quick Save Load.
EXTENSION.QUICKSL.MULTIPLAYER_HOST_REJEC: The host declined this Quick Save Load request.
EXTENSION.QUICKSL.MULTIPLAYER_CLIENT_DIS: The host has disabled client-initiated Quick Save Load.
This Quick Save Load was cancelled.
EXTENSION.QUICKSL.MULTIPLAYER_FEATURE_DI: Multiplayer Quick SL is not active
Multiplayer Quick SL is not currently active. Enable it in MOD Settings. If you change it during an online session, it will take effect after you fully disconnect.
